opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart keeps skipping beats and fluttering in my chest when I lie down, and I feel like I am going to have a heart attack.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started this evening when I was trying to get to sleep and it's freaking me out — I can't sleep and I'm scared something is really wrong with my heart.

symptom_narrative.onset: earlier this evening, came on gradually when I lay down to sleep
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours, comes and goes
symptom_narrative.character: a fluttering, skipping feeling — like my heart trips over itself, and I'm very aware of it beating
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really distressing — it feels awful and I'm convinced it's my heart
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: intermittent, worse when I lie still and quiet at night
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; sitting up and distracting myself maybe helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying down and paying attention to it; being stressed
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mostly just feeling really anxious and wound up; no pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt the odd flutter before but never this bad or for this long
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't sleep, can't settle, keep checking my pulse

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: had about five energy/caffeine drinks today; there are a few empty energy drink cans around
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: under a lot of stress at the moment and very wound up tonight

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, worried messages, repeatedly seeking reassurance that it isn't a heart attack

objective_data_offered.value: around 84 beats per minute, feels mostly regular with the odd skip
objective_data_offered.timing: checked a few minutes ago on my smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer smartwatch reading, single spot check; cannot reliably characterise rhythm or catch short paroxysms
